title: Recursive Description Generation
scenario: Generate a detailed description of a fictional universe, including its physical properties, astronomical objects, and life forms. The description should be recursively generated, meaning that each level of description should reference and build upon the previous one.
constraints: Must use a consistent narrative voice and tense
Must include at least five levels of recursive description

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the tone of the description is coherent and engaging.
Verify that the description meets the word count and narrative voice requirements.
Check the number of levels of recursive description present in the text.
